name: cms-contentful
description: Maintain the Contentful CMS module installed by StackFoundry.
---

# Contentful CMS Maintenance Instructions

- Keep module ownership clear.
- Update docs with behavior changes.
- Add verification steps before release.
- Do not introduce provider lock-in outside the module boundary.

agentSkills.name: contentful
agentSkills.content:
---
name: contentful
description: Contentful CMS guidance for installed content modules.
---

# Contentful Guidance

- Keep management tokens server-only.
- Document content model ids and preview behavior.
- Separate preview from production delivery tokens.
- Verify fallback behavior when content is missing.
